title: My Simple Skincare Regimen
excerpt: This post is sponsored by Rodan + Fields. All opinions are my own. My creative partners and I really appreciate your continued support. Big change (even amazing joyful change) means it’s time to up the self-care. With two incredible children…
body:
This post is sponsored by Rodan + Fields. All opinions are my own. My creative partners and I really appreciate your continued support.

Big change (even amazing joyful change) means it’s time to up the self-care. With two incredible children and one small business to take care of, it’s easy to let things fall by the wayside. But one thing I’ve learned over the years is to make time for those few moments alone, whether it’s a 5-minute meditation, quick stop to get a manicure or going for a short run. Even small moments of self-care can make all the difference in my ability to enjoy family time or challenging creative projects.

   

With so much emphasis on getting “back to normal” as quarantine gradually lifts, I want to make sure I bring my healthy habits with me. One of those habits is a simple skincare regimen to keep me glowing on and off camera. I love having one or two products (instead of something super complicated) so that if I want to shoot a quick video or go live on Instagram, I can do it with or without makeup. 

   

I’ve always had combination skin; it’s oily in my t-zone and dry everywhere else, so finding products that feel just right can be challenging. Dryness can cause wrinkles and fine lines and oiliness can lead to breakouts. If I’m busy or stressed, breakouts and wrinkles seem to magically appear. Luckily, I have two hero serums from Rodan + Fields that make all the difference in my routine:  REDEFINE Intensive Renewing Serum and  Active Hydration Serum. Both products are packed full of important ingredients to visibly improve firmness and elasticity. They make it easy to glow. 

   

Los Angeles is right in the middle of a dry, warm climate. The museums, palm trees and beaches more than make up for it but as summer approaches, the temperature is high and there’s little to no moisture in the air. Dryness can cause dehydration, fine lines, and wrinkles – no thank you! While I do my best to stay hydrated and drink plenty of water, my skin still needs that extra boost and that’s where the Active Hydration Serum comes into play. It boosts skin hydration levels by 200% using an awesome combination of Glycerin and cross-linked Hyaluronic Acid and even locks in that moisture so it can last all day long.


I love applying it just after cleansing and toning my face in the morning. It’s an excellent way to guard against the dry air as I go about my day. The serum is light-weight and absorbs right into my skin. It doesn’t feel heavy or greasy. Good skincare is all about consistency, so I make sure this small but vital step happens everyday. I can already see a major difference, especially in the places my skin needs it most. On especially hot or dry days, I’ll add it to my evening routine, as well. Of course, I always follow up with a good sunscreen to protect against UV rays. 

   

Ending the day on a good note is one of my favorite things. So before the bedtime stories and cuddle sessions, I dip into my favorite way to renew my skin. Once I cleanse and tone my skin, I add in the Rodan + Fields REDEFINE Intensive Renewing Serum. It is probably the most futuristic (and eco-friendly) part of my skincare routine. Each dose of the serum comes in its own little biodegradable capsule. It’s Goldilocks sized (not too big or too little) and once I twist off the little end and gently massage it into my face and neck, I can feel the Vitamin-A goodness sinking right in. Not only is it the perfect portion, the serum comes in capsules to make sure all 60 doses stay preserved so that it can do what it’s supposed to – keep my skin looking young and wrinkle-free. I love how self-contained this step in my routine is and my skin drinks it right up. 

If you caught yourself frowning over headlines in the past year, you were not alone. Trust me, there was plenty for all of us to think about. Thankfully, those worry lines are not permanent and neither is the constant stress and busyness that causes them. There are plenty of tools in my stash I keep around to help chip away at tension when it comes up and starts to feel overwhelming. Whether you’re an entrepreneur, mother of two, or happily employed at a traditional 9-5, remember to prioritize your self-care.

What products do you use to keep your skin happy? Have you tried Rodan + Fields?
